# Biohazard Zero: HD Remaster

name: Infinite Ammo
mode: once
w32 00153944 48000048

name: Infinite Ammo v2 (Infinity Symbol)
mode: once
w32 00152C20 3BE000FF
w32 00152C24 93E30000
w32 00152C28 60000000

name: Low Time
mode: once
w32 0026D8EC 60000000

name: Save 0
mode: once
w32 00313814 38800000

name: Infinite Countdown Timer
mode: once
w32 0038C8D8 60000000
w32 002122F8 60000000

name: Infinite Health
mode: once
w32 00AA04A4 80D90244
w32 00AA04A8 2C06000C
w32 00AA04AC 4082000C
w32 00AA04B0 38C000FA
w32 00AA04B4 90D91040
w32 00AA04B8 80D91044
w32 00AA04BC 4B7163B4
w32 001B686C 488E9C38

w32 001995E4 48906F29

name: Bullets Never Decrease
mode: once
w32 00153948 7F9FE378

mode: once

mode: once

name: AoB Bullets Never Decrease
mode: once
aob 7FFFE01083BE003C57FF043E281D0006 7F9FE37883BE003C57FF043E281D0006

name: AoB Health Never Decreases
mode: once
aob 4801EC65E80100C07C0803A6EB610088 60000000E80100C07C0803A6EB610088
aob 41820024636300004801B64D2C030010 48000024636300004801B64D2C030010

mode: once
aob EC2120FCFC01F800D02300004CC01382 EC2120FCFC01F800600000004CC01382
